IsA: It is a Tel Aviv street art mural.
It is a work of street art.
HasA: It has seven artists from the "27 Club".
It has an unknown figure believed to depict Kiss.
It has portraits of famous artists.
It has a portrait of the artist in gray.
It has a portrait of the artist covered by pink paint.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by depicting seven artists from the "27 Club".
It is characterized by its creation in 2014.
It is characterized by its location in the Florentin neighborhood.
It is characterized by the artists Brian Jones, Jimi Hendrix, Janis Joplin, Jim Morrison, Jean-Michel Basquiat, Kurt Cobain, and Amy Winehouse.
It is characterized by the artist John Kiss.
It is characterized by its size of 3 m high by 7 m wide.
It is characterized by its status as one of Israel's must-see street artworks.
It is characterized by its popularity in Florentin.
It is characterized by its appearance in international articles and museum exhibits.
It is characterized by its symbolism of gentrification and being an icon of the city.
UsedFor: It is used for depicting seven artists from the "27 Club".
It is used for symbolizing the gentrification process in South Tel Aviv.
It is used for being an icon of the city.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Florentin neighborhood of Tel Aviv, Israel.
CreatedBy: It was created by the Israeli artist John Kiss.
It was created with the assistance of Itai Froumin and Roman Kozhokin.
CreatedIn: It was created in Tel Aviv.
ConsistsOf: It consists of portraits of Brian Jones, Jimi Hendrix, Janis Joplin, Jim Morrison, Jean-Michel Basquiat, Kurt Cobain, Amy Winehouse, and an unknown figure.
It consists of seven artists from the "27 Club".
It consists of a portrait of the artist in gray.
It consists of a portrait of the artist covered by pink paint.
KnownFor: It is known for depicting seven artists from the "27 Club".
It is known for being one of Israel's must-see street artworks.
It is known for being the most popular street art in Florentin.
It is known for its appearance in international articles.
It is known for being considered one of the top graffiti works in Israel.
It is known for symbolizing the gentrification process in South Tel Aviv.
It is known for being an icon of the city of Tel Aviv.
It is known for being cited among the most beautiful in Tel Aviv.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the "27 Club".
It is associated with the Florentin neighborhood.
It is associated with the artist John Kiss.
It is associated with peace activism.
It is associated with the holiday of Rosh Hashana.
It is associated with Tel Aviv city hall.
It is associated with Yedioth Ahronoth.
It is associated with the gentrification process in South Tel Aviv.
It is associated with Time Out Magazine.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Florentin neighborhood.
About: It is about artists who died at the age of 27.
It is about the artist John Kiss.
It is about the secretive creation process of street art.
It is about the pain which follows the disappearance of sudden gratification of fame.
It is about the dangerous emptiness that follows fame.
